title: Flash Power Mop Refills with 16 Pads Floor Cleaning Absorbing Lock Home Surface Pad Multi-Surface
features: 【Convenience】Flash Mop refills provide a convenient solution to keep your floors clean. They are pre soaked with a cleaning solution, so you don't have to mix or carry around buckets of water and cleaning products. With a simple attachment, you can quickly replace the refill and keep mopping with ease.

HYGIENE Flash Mop refills are designed to provide an effective and hygienic cleaning experience. The cleaning solution in the refill is specifically formulated to remove dirt, grime and bacteria from your floors. This helps maintain a cleaner and healthier living environment for you and your family.

TIME SAVING Using Flash Mop refills can save you valuable time and effort. The pre soaked pads are ready to use so you can start cleaning right away. They also eliminate the need to rinse or wring out a traditional mop, making the mopping process faster and more efficient.

VERSATILITY Flash Mop refills are suitable for a variety of hard floor surfaces including tile, laminate, vinyl and hardwood. This versatility ensures that you can use the refills on different floors in your home without the need for multiple cleaning tools or products.

Cost effective Investing in flash mop refills can be a cost effective option compared to traditional mops and cleaning solutions. The refills are typically designed for multiple uses, allowing you to get the most out of each pad. Additionally, they are often available in bulk or multi pack options, which can offer further savings in the long run.
description: Absorb and lock away dirt, grease and grime with the Flash Powermop Absorbing Pad Refill Pack. These refills are safe for use on all hard sealed surfaces . The refill pads are perfect for easy deep cleaning on almost any floor in your home. Use a solution to loosen all types of dirt, grease and grime and lift it away from the floor so it can be easily vacuumed up by the pad. Easy to use, simply place on the underside of the mop head, with a clever absorbent core that absorbs and stores the dirty solution and grease and grime, leaving the floor shiny, clean and dry. Compatible with any Flash Powermop machine, old or new. Includes Shabba Dabba Doo cleaning guide
